column1: # gate which section renders (spec §9; ECMA-376 §18.8.31 conditional codes).
# Selection: the first conditioned section whose test passes (against the
# RAW signed value) wins; otherwise the first UNCONDITIONED section is the
# section auto-prefixes a minus — a matched conditional section owns its
# sign, AND the unconditioned fallthrough behaves like the negative section
# [>=100]0;-0 of -5 is "-5" (the author's own minus, not doubled).
